title: habenella strictissima
intro: Habenella strictissima, also known as Indian snakeroot, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive disorders. Habenella strictissima can be prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and it is also used in the form of a powder or an infusion in traditional herbal preparations.
